menuItems.name: The Karen Gillan
menuItems.description: It's lemon poundcake French toast! Served up with macerated Michigan strawberries and burnt butter cream cheese.

menuItems.name: El Puerco Borracho
menuItems.description: Pork carnitas swimming in beer soaked pintos served up with eggs how you like 'em, a jack cheese and scallion quesadilla, lime crema and salsa verde.

menuItems.name: Cup of Soup
menuItems.description: Daily soup, no photo — should be dropped.

menuItems.name: Green Eggs and Ham
menuItems.description: Should be ignored — not a special.
